name: 7artisans Lens 9mm f/5.6 Full Frame Photoelectric (Almost O Distortion)
description: Offering a dynamic ultra-wide perspective, this full-frame 9mm f/5.6 Lens from 7artisans Photoelectric provides a uniquely wide angle of view cameras that is well-suited for interior, architecture, nature, and landscape subjects.
